steps.assistant_text: 6-byte-record table lookup, 78.3%->exact. (1) 6-byte struct array indexing (S6{u16 h0,h1,h2}; &tbl60[...]) produces the same-register sll/subu/sll x6 IXA chains. (2) A NAMED idx local can NEVER match: interference is BB-granular so it colors $a1 ahead of the param (injects move a2,a1); the target's $t9 home means idx must stay an EXPRESSION TEMP. (3) Load-bearing spelling (permuter iter ~111, hand-minimized): (v1 + a1)->h0 flat pointer-add deref instead of v1[a1].h0 — flips outer temp order (tbl60 base lw = first temp t6, lhu -> t9, final addu base-first). Cousin of the array-IXA addu-order rule: INNER SPELLING selects the ucode shape.

metadata.verification: 20/20 word-exact (in-tree object at 0x1ece4) + make ROM byte-identical (promoted)
